domain_hint: axial fan stage aerodynamics CFD, RANS k-omega SST, rotor-stator mixing plane, stall margin prediction
ambiguity_notes: (1) Mesh convergence – GCI is documented at design point and SIM-VCF-007 claims mesh independence for the stall case, but no off-design GCI study exists; the two claims directly contradict each other. (2) Solver convergence – near-stall residuals plateau at 8e-4 (two orders above target) yet SIM-VCF-007 states "converged solution obtained" and reports a stall-point value used in the use-case assessment. (3) Uncertainty quantification – SIM-VCF-008 claims ±3% total model uncertainty but this is contradicted by the observed 4.8% discrepancy at 80% flow coefficient and no supporting calculation is provided. (4) Analyst qualification – QP-AERO-03 requires documented competency records; the slide deck notes only verbal confirmation exists, contradicting the project quality plan requirement.
